breakdown: This PR adds XP progress tracking (current_xp/next_level_xp) to the rewards box visibility check in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui, plus updates function references in test files. Quality is moderate: naming is descriptive but type annotations are absent for the new logic checking XP fields, and no new error handling was added. Test coverage is unclear since changes only update references without clear addition of new test cases for the XP tracking logic.
key_changes: Added XP progress tracking visibility check: or (current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0) in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui
Updated docstring to mention XP progress tracking condition
Renamed test fixtures from world_logic_module to session_header_utils in session header tests
Updated function reference comments from ensure_level_up_rewards_pending to _check_and_set_level_up_pending
Updated test comments to reflect the new function name in world_logic.py
